messages.content:
Which term describes a Cloud provider allowing more than one company to share or rent the same server?


elasticity


server tenancy


server pooling


multitenancy
multitenancy

A company offers customers access to servers, storage, and networking resources within their data center.

What type of service does this represent?


Database as a Service (DBaaS)


Platform as a Service (PaaS)


Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)


Software as a Service (SaaS)
Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)

Accenture has signed a multi-year agreement to help a mobile telecom provider migrate its applications to the Cloud over a period of several years, as it seeks to implement a leaner operating model.

Which activity should Accenture execute first to provide the client with an optimal Cloud solution/landscape?


prototype new products and services


begin migrating the client’s applications


define a strategy and roadmap


negotiate pricing with the client’s preferred Cloud provider
define a strategy and roadmap

What is an example of using the Internet of Things (IoT) to deliver innovative Cloud based solutions to customers?


customers using a PC connected to a local network to search for recommendations


a utility company using a blockchain-based database to secure microgrid transactions


wearable technology that provides customers with on-the-spot personalized experiences


online surveys that gather customer input to improve services in the future
wearable technology that provides customers with on-the-spot personalized experiences

How does a Cloud-first strategy approach a client's migration to the Cloud?


by focusing on a single discipline based on the client's greatest area of need


by bringing multiple services together to serve the client's business needs


by enabling the client to manage their Cloud transformation on their own


by removing outside ecosystem partners from the Cloud transition process
by bringing multiple services together to serve the client's business needs

What would be an ideal scenario for using edge computing solutions?


a regional sales report uploaded to a central server once a week


an office where workers are directly connected to the company network


a hospital department that performs high-risk, time-sensitive surgeries


a farming business whose equipment is older and lacks digital devices
a hospital department that performs high-risk, time-sensitive surgeries

A leading pharmaceutical company is launching a major transformation of its entire Cloud operations in order to more quickly and efficiently perform research and conduct clinical trials.

How can a Cloud-first strategy help this client?


by automating the entire scope of the client's business


by providing a data and analytics platform that keeps the client's legacy systems intact


by providing a data-centric approach that offers more speed, agility, and security


by transforming and upskilling the client's workforce to build their own Cloud solution
by providing a data-centric approach that offers more speed, agility, and security

HealthyApp, a new Accenture H&PS client, specializes in developing custom software for hospitals and other medical facilities. For the upcoming fiscal year, they want to move to a more agile and innovative software development model, in which their developers can focus on application features and functionality, rather than underlying environments and infrastructure.

Which Cloud computing model would provide HealthyApp with the framework to help achieve this goal?


Platform as a Service (PaaS)


Software as a Service (SaaS)


Database as a Service (DBaaS)


Network as a Service (NaaS)
Platform as a Service (PaaS)

An international fast-food chain is looking for opportunities to leverage the Cloud to gain insights into customer data, including location, and order patterns. The client has engaged Accenture to help create customer-focused experiences, including promotions.

They need Accenture's help with this campaign and to create a unique user experience for all their customers.

Which technology, when partnered with Cloud, would allow this to occur?


Blockchain


Extended Reality


Edge Computing


Artificial Intelligence
Artificial Intelligence

A Chief Technology Officer has seen the company grow significantly in the last three months. Historically, the application was hosted with on-premise hardware, but recently moved some components of the application to the Cloud.

Which type of Cloud environment is being used?


Multi-Cloud


Private Cloud


Hybrid Cloud


Public Cloud
Hybrid Cloud

An Accenture client is eager to begin their Cloud transformation but needs guidance on selecting the right approach to meet their specific needs and objectives.

Which tool can help advise this client on the right Cloud solution?


myWizard


Amazon AWS


Cloud Portal


myNav
myNav

A Software Developer wants to add a new feature to an existing application operating in the Cloud, but only wants to pay for the computing time the code actually uses when it is called.

Which term describes this feature of computing?


pooled resources


multitenancy


serverless computing


elasticity
serverless computing

In which type of situation would it make sense to use edge computing?


where there are few or no digital devices to capture data


where critical decisions must be made on a split-second basis


where users are in close proximity to the central data server


where data is uploaded to a server at a scheduled time each week
where critical decisions must be made on a split-second basis

What is the next step an organization should take after capturing and collecting data?


break data into smaller chunks


contextualize data


filter and prioritize data


process and curate data
filter and prioritize data
